param.value: {englishResponse=Hello, thank you for asking! I am a virtual assistant here to help you with any inquiry or request for information. How can I assist you today?, sendingCode=<script>alert('XSS')</script>, greetMessage=Hellow How are you, arabicResponse=مرحبًا، شكرًا لسؤالك. أنا بخير وأتمنى أن تكون بخير أيضًا. كيف يمكنني مساعدتك اليوم؟, arabicRequest=مرحبًا، كيف حالك؟, arabicToEnglishValidation=Hello, thank you for asking,How can I help you today?, password=test, govGptResponseValidationText=I’m sorry. I’m not able to assist with your request. Please ask a different question., enlishRequest=Hello, how are you?, name=Farrukh, sendingSpecialCharacters=&&&@#@@$3, email=farrukh.mohsin@northbaysolutions.net, UserRequest=Abhu Dhabi visit visa details}
